calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-28-2011 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-27-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Represented by Gwen Washington. Attorney Monelle Palencia appearing for the Plaintiff.
Defendants, Silvia Santos. Jose Arredondo, Brenda Arredondo and Paola Arredondo are present.

Attorney Michell Nunez representing the defendants through limited scope.
The settlement attorney Jim Watson, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled, signed settlement agreement is not filed. The trial date of OCT-31-2011 is vacated.
